steps.title: Choose the service you need
steps.description: Select PAN, Aadhaar, Licence, banking, insurance, or bill payment service.

steps.title: Contact us via WhatsApp or social media

steps.title: Submit documents and complete your work

about.title: About Us
about.paragraph1: {name} provides digital and financial services to help people easily access government and banking services. We support PAN card application, driving licence assistance, banking services, bill payments, and online form processing with fast and reliable local support.
about.paragraph2: Our goal is simple: quick service, clear guidance, and trusted assistance for every customer in the local community.

reviews.name: Rakesh Kumar
reviews.text: Very fast PAN correction work. Staff guided every step properly.

reviews.name: Shabana Parveen
reviews.text: Best place for online forms and bill payments. Charges are reasonable.

reviews.name: Sanjay Yadav
reviews.text: Reliable money transfer and Aadhaar update support. Highly recommended.

footer.blurb: Your trusted local partner for digital and financial services.
